category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a game for git to guess who made which commit.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo already points to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface from the supplied source facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/jsomers/git-game, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies game behavior based on Git commits; source_facts.executables lists git-game.
